{{Infobox location
| name = Asylum
| introduced = cradle-01-unsouled
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|Asylum is one of several important worlds designated for protection by the [[Abidan]], serving as a potential last bastion against infinite chaos. It is considered a high-priority location within [[Sector Eleven]], alongside [[Cradle]]. The world functions as a prison designed specifically to hold [[Subject One]], an individual known as the first subject. While it is currently considered relatively safe due to the presence of [[Oth’kimeth]], its security relies on elaborate script-formations that have been failing for decades.}}

== Unsouled ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Asylum]] is an important world.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c20">''Unsouled'', chapter 20</ref>}}

== Blackflame ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Asylum]] is where the only individuals known capable of threatening [[Judges]] are imprisoned.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c21">''Blackflame'', chapter 21</ref>}}

== Uncrowned ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Asylum]] is a location that contains [[Class One Fiends]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c21">''Uncrowned'', chapter 21</ref>}}

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Asylum]] is a world in [[Sector]] 11.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c15">''Reaper'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Asylum]] is a strategically valuable world in range.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c22">''Reaper'', chapter 22</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Unsouled]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle locations]]
[[Category:Otherworldly locations]]
